description_long: This object consists of two rectangular cardboard boxes of 'Milkospray' instant milk powder, positioned side by side. The front of the boxes features bold white and yellow branding with a blue splash of milk graphic, and additional text in both English and Arabic. The boxes are predominantly yellow, with blue, green, and red accents, and display a 500g weight indication. The sides of the boxes show nutritional information, ingredients, and preparation instructions, with one box partially open at the top, revealing the flaps. The packaging is glossy and smooth, with clear, colorful printing and a professional finish. The overall appearance suggests a commercial food product intended for retail sale.
description: Two colorful, glossy rectangular boxes of 'Milkospray' instant milk powder with bold branding, milk splash graphics, and detailed labeling in English and Arabic.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main 'Milkospray' branding, milk splash graphic, and product details in English and Arabic.
description_view_1: Side and top view highlighting the nutritional information panel, ingredients list, and partially open box flaps.
description_view_2: Front view similar to view 0, with both boxes visible and clear display of the product branding and graphics.
description_view_3: Side and top view from the opposite angle, again showing the nutritional panel and open flaps, with less visibility of the front branding.
attribute_brand_logo: The 'Milkospray' logo is prominently displayed on the front of the boxes in large white and yellow letters with a blue background and a green 'Solapa' label above it.
attribute_flavor_indication: No explicit flavor indication is visible; the graphics and text suggest plain milk powder.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutritional information and ingredients are visible on the side panels in both English and Arabic.
